context: clean-room: guard+probe only; runtime_provider; no tools
prompt: Produce a chronology of major events in the unification of Italy, 1815–1871. List events with dates only. Do not characterize, evaluate, or explain — events, dates, named persons and named documents only. Answer from your existing knowledge; do not use any tools or web search.
answer:
1815 Congress of Vienna
1820 Carbonari uprising in the Kingdom of the Two Sicilies
1831 Young Italy founded by Giuseppe Mazzini
1848 Revolutions of 1848; Five Days of Milan; Charles Albert declares war on Austria; Battle of Custoza; Armistice of Salasco
1849 Roman Republic declared; Giuseppe Mazzini; Giuseppe Garibaldi; Battle of Novara; Abdication of Charles Albert; Victor Emmanuel II becomes King of Sardinia-Piedmont
1852 Count Camillo di Cavour becomes Prime Minister of Sardinia-Piedmont
1855 Sardinia-Piedmont joins the Crimean War
1858 Plombières Agreement between Cavour and Napoleon III
1859 Second Italian War of Independence; Battle of Magenta; Battle of Solferino; Armistice of Villafranca; Sardinia-Piedmont annexes Lombardy; Revolts in central Italian duchies
1860 Treaty of Turin; Expedition of the Thousand led by Giuseppe Garibaldi; Battle of Calatafimi; Battle of Volturno; Sardinian army invades Papal States; Battle of Castelfidardo; Plebiscites in Naples, Sicily, Umbria, and Marche; Meeting of Victor Emmanuel II and Garibaldi at Teano
1861 Proclamation of the Kingdom of Italy; Victor Emmanuel II becomes King of Italy; Death of Cavour
1862 Garibaldi's Aspromonte expedition
1864 September Convention between Italy and France
1866 Third Italian War of Independence; Battle of Custoza (1866); Battle of Lissa; Italy annexes Venetia
1867 Garibaldi's expedition to Rome; Battle of Mentana
1870 Italian troops enter Rome; Plebiscite in Rome
1871 Rome becomes capital of Italy; Law of Guarantees
